commit_scope: Require the Windows fkwu fourth arm in CI and make both the self-JIT verifier and standalone Windows form-cli build support the same emitted-C host shims, so the resulting native executables run on fkwu with no Go, clang, LLVM, or table file available at runtime.
evidence_refs: form/build-form-cli.sh -> Windows emitted-C patch path now applies arc4random, read/write prototype, mkdir arity, sprintf/vsnprintf, gettimeofday, and dlopen/dlsym host shims before clang compiles the standalone form-cli executable

scripts/verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1 -> Windows emitted-C patch path now applies the same shims and links ws2_32 plus legacy_stdio_definitions before compiling the self-JIT witness, so CI's LLVM/MSVC link path supports the POSIX-shaped symbols instead of skipping the proof
form/build-form-cli.sh -> explicit output parent directories are created before linking, so .cache/form-cli-win.exe works on Windows

.github/workflows/windows-host.yml -> Windows floor now adds LLVM to PATH, requires fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way for adler32 and form-asm, and runs both Windows fkwu self-JIT plus native form-cli runtime verifiers

powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1 -> PASS windows-fkwu-self-jit cold=317811 hot=317811 njit=26; runtime-toolchain-free path=C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS go=absent clang=absent llvm_objdump=absent

powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\verify_windows_form_cli_native.ps1 -> PASS windows-form-cli-native bytes=485888; PASS windows-form-cli-ping output=pong; PASS windows-form-cli-verify native=fkwu embedded_source=true; runtime-toolchain-free path=C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS go=absent clang=absent llvm_objdump=absent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/adler32.fk form-stdlib/tests/adler32-band.fk -> verdict 5; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-asm-band.fk -> verdict 31; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent

Subagent Hooke read-only verification -> PASS: diff scope limited to workflow, form/build-form-cli.sh, and scripts/verify_windows_form_cli_native.ps1; both PowerShell verifiers passed; adler32 and form-asm each reported fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 0 divergent

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: This change updates the local Windows host floor and CI workflow. Public deployment validation remains pending until PR checks and merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local and sub-agent validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until commit, push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Windows no longer treats fkwu as an optional skipped leg in the host floor, the self-JIT verifier supports CI's Windows linker surface, and the standalone Windows form-cli .exe can be built from the current Form carrier then run with no runtime access to Go, clang, LLVM, or table files.
public_endpoints: local-only: Windows Form stdlib/fkwu/form-cli floor; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Form four-way proof: adler32 and form-asm bands each validate on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.
Runtime proof: verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1 runs the emitted self-JIT witness under a sanitized runtime PATH and reports cold=317811 hot=317811 njit=26.

CLI proof: verify_windows_form_cli_native.ps1 builds .cache/form-cli-win.exe, strips runtime PATH to Windows system directories, verifies go/clang/llvm-objdump are absent, then proves ping, verify, and source responses come from the native fkwu CLI executable.
